title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL. The lecture discusses best practices for efficient data storage and querying. It is part of Harvard's CS50 course available through edX and Harvard Extension School.
